scripts.typecheck:frontend: cd frontend && bun x tsc -p tsconfig.typecheck.json --noEmit
scripts.api:generate: cd backend && php artisan l5-swagger:generate && cd .. && bun run api:extract:gpt && cd frontend && bun run api:generate
scripts.api:check: cd backend && php artisan l5-swagger:generate && cd .. && bun run api:extract:gpt && cd frontend && bun run api:check && cd .. && git diff --exit-code backend/storage/api-docs/gpt-auth-openapi.json
